prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD regional game-map art plate for ASMR Shinkansen runtime overlay (zoom band between corridor and city)
Primary request: Create a polished early-2000s Japanese railway management simulator view of the Nobi plain around Nagoya: Ise Bay coastline at the lower left, the Kiso river valley, dense low-rise urban sprawl, rice fields, and an elevated double-track Shinkansen viaduct sweeping in one continuous diagonal across the scene from upper-right to lower-left with a small white 16-car train on it.
Style/medium: dense isometric pixel-art / A-Train / SimCity BuildIt reference, miniature transport sim map, crisp hand-painted pixels, readable geography, not photoreal. Identical palette, lighting and pixel density to the existing lod-style-v2 plates.
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide, viaduct is the only dominant rail line, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm clear morning, relaxing, soft shadows.
Constraints: one continuous unbroken viaduct diagonal; no logos, no watermark, no text.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD approach game-map art plate for ASMR Shinkansen runtime overlay (zoom band just above city view)
Primary request: Create a polished isometric pixel-art scene of the Shinkansen approach into central Nagoya: elevated double-track viaduct running in one continuous diagonal from upper-left to lower-right through mid-rise Japanese cityscape, crossing a river and ordinary commuter rail lines, with station buildings beginning to appear near the lower-right.
Style/medium: dense isometric pixel-art / A-Train / SimCity BuildIt reference, identical palette, lighting and pixel density to the existing lod-style-v2 plates.
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide, the Shinkansen viaduct is the single dominant diagonal, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm clear morning, relaxing, soft shadows.
Constraints: one continuous unbroken viaduct diagonal; no logos, no watermark, no text.

Primary request: Create a polished isometric pixel-art regional view of the Kansai basin between Kyoto and Osaka: the Yodo river valley, low mountains framing the basin, temple districts on the hills, dense urban carpet toward Osaka Bay at the lower left, and an elevated double-track Shinkansen viaduct sweeping in one continuous diagonal across the scene from upper-right to lower-left with a small white 16-car train.
Style/medium: dense isometric pixel-art / A-Train / SimCity BuildIt reference, identical palette, lighting and pixel density to the existing lod-style-v2 plates.
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide, viaduct is the only dominant rail line, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm clear morning, relaxing, soft shadows.
Constraints: one continuous unbroken viaduct diagonal; no logos, no watermark, no text.

Style/medium: dense isometric pixel-art / A-Train / SimCity BuildIt reference, identical palette, lighting and pixel density to the existing lod-style-v2 plates.
